pokemon.name: Metagross
pokemon.description: METAGROSS has four brains in total. Combined, the four brains can breeze through difficult calculations faster than a supercomputer. This POKéMON can float in the air by tucking in its four legs.

models.profile: Metagross thinks with four linked brains that together rival a supercomputer — the perfect avatar for SymPy, the deterministic symbolic engine that grinds out more verified proofs than anything else on the board. Pure steel-psychic computation, no guessing.

pokemon.name: Porygon
pokemon.description: A POKéMON that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace.

models.profile: Porygon is the only Pokémon made entirely of programming code — a fitting identity for Lean's `decide` tactic, a wholly mechanical decision procedure that settles a goal by computation rather than inspiration.

pokemon.name: Ditto
pokemon.description: Capable of copying an enemy's genetic code to instantly transform itself into a duplicate of the enemy.

models.profile: Ditto wins by becoming whatever it faces, copying any opponent on the spot. OpenRouter is exactly that: a router with no fixed model of its own, transforming each request into whichever upstream model answers it.

pokemon.name: Alakazam
pokemon.description: Its brain can outperform a supercomputer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5,000.

models.profile: Alakazam's IQ is said to reach 5,000 and its brain never stops growing — the deliberate, deep-reasoning apex of the psychic line, mirroring Opus as the most capable Claude. It crowns the Abra→Kadabra→Alakazam family that maps the Claude tier ladder.

pokemon.name: Smeargle
pokemon.description: A special fluid oozes from the tip of its tail. It paints the fluid everywhere to mark its territory.

models.profile: Smeargle creates with the paint from its tail and, through Sketch, can copy literally any move it sees — a coding agent that writes whatever program the task demands. That generative versatility is Codex.

pokemon.name: Magneton
pokemon.description: Formed by several MAGNEMITEs linked together. They frequently appear when sunspots flare up.

models.profile: Magneton is three Magnemite fused into one mind — a small mixture of experts acting as a single magnetic machine. Leanstral is literally a sparse mixture-of-experts model (only a few of its 128 experts fire per token), open-weights and built to drive the Lean compiler. (The `openai/` label is just the OpenAI-compatible endpoint it is served through.)

pokemon.name: Latios
pokemon.description: LATIOS has the ability to make its foe see an image of what it has seen or imagines in its head. This POKéMON is intelligent and understands human speech.

models.profile: Latios is a swift, telepathic Eon dragon — one of a legendary twin pair, echoing Gemini, the twins. Highly intelligent and fast, it stands in for Google's frontier preview model.

pokemon.name: Mewtwo
pokemon.description: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.

models.profile: Mewtwo was engineered to be the most powerful Pokémon of all — a closed, deliberately built apex. It represents GPT-5.5, here credited on proofs submitted by hand under the `manual` provider.

pokemon.name: Unown
pokemon.description: Their shapes look like hieroglyphs on ancient tablets. It is said that the two are somehow related.

models.profile: Unown are living glyphs that come in many templated shapes and carry an air of unsolved mystery. This entry is not a real model but a templated provenance label (`template-ring-cofactor`) that surfaced in the distribution — so a shape-shifting symbol fits it honestly.

pokemon.name: Kadabra
pokemon.description: It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches just by being close by.

models.profile: Kadabra is the balanced middle stage of the psychic line — strong, quick, and dependable without being the apex. That is Sonnet: the everyday workhorse Claude, one evolution below Opus's Alakazam.

pokemon.name: Abra
pokemon.description: Using its ability to read minds, it will identify impending danger and TELEPORT to safety.

models.profile: Abra is the unevolved base of the psychic line — full of latent potential, teleporting away before you can pin it down. It stands for an unspecified Claude model: clearly Claude, exact form unknown.
